name: Red Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut smoked meat or ham bone into 2-inch lengths.
2. Soak beans overnight if possible. Drain and add enough cold water to cover the beans in a large 8- or 10-quart pot.
3. Add chopped yellow onions, garlic, and bring to a boil.
4. Cook for one hour.
5. Add parsley, smoked sausage, salt, and pepper. If necessary, add more cold water.
6. Simmer (slight bubbling action) for 2 more hours or until the beans are soft.
7. Remove 2 cups of cooked beans and mash well.
8. Return mashed beans to the pot and stir into the mixture. This creates a creamy, thicker gravy.
9. If the beans are too dry, add enough water to achieve desired consistency.
10. Serve over boiled rice.
Serves 8.
